info.title: Platform Admin API
info.description: Generated from the platform admin resource contract. Do not edit this file manually; update resources/admin-resources.json and regenerate.

tags.name: settings
tags.description: System settings runtime assembled from enabled capability manifests.

tags.name: sensitive-reveal
tags.description: Step-up verification and one-time sensitive field reveal endpoints.

tags.name: service-objects
tags.description: Versioned server-side QueryDefinition and CommandDefinition execution.

tags.name: appIdentities
tags.description: App Identities / App 身份绑定

post.description:
Resource: demoData
Permission: admin:demo-data:apply
Audit action: demo_data.apply

Resource: files
Permission: admin:file:create
Audit action: file.upload

Manual v1 run endpoint for the notification delivery worker contract. It validates SMS provider configuration, uses Aliyun/Tencent live SMS SDK adapters when live sending is enabled, and still supports dry-run/config validation receipts. SMTP/WeChat supplier integration is not claimed until separate adapter evidence exists.

503.description: Message center delivery runtime is unavailable

post.x-platform-provider-truth: Aliyun/Tencent live SMS SDK adapters plus dry-run/config validation; SMTP/WeChat supplier integration not claimed

post.summary: Send one message-center SMS test notification
post.description: Exercises the notification SMS runtime from the message center. The request accepts a raw recipient only as a write-only send target; notification and delivery records store redacted target metadata and template parameter keys.

503.description: Message center SMS runtime is unavailable

post.x-platform-secret-handling: request recipient and template parameter values are write-only; records and receipts expose redacted target metadata only

get.description: Reports the running capability set, desired lock-file capability set and whether a manual restart is required. v1 does not support runtime hot install or uninstall.

post.description: Credential-auth v1 privileged password reset contract. The new password secret uses the same application-layer encrypted secret envelope; no reset token, raw password or verifier material is returned.

post.summary: Change the current Admin credential-auth password
post.description: Credential-auth v1 contract for current-user password change. Current and new secrets use the same ECDH P-256, HKDF-SHA256 and AES-256-GCM/A256GCM encrypted secret envelope as login.

post.summary: Consume a grant and reveal one sensitive field value
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

get.summary: Get the step-up policy for one sensitive field
get.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Create a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Complete OIDC reauthentication for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Start OIDC reauthentication for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Complete SMS verification for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Start SMS verification for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

404.description: Service-object runtime unavailable or CommandDefinition not found

post.summary: Execute a versioned server-side persisted QueryDefinition

404.description: Service-object runtime unavailable or QueryDefinition not found

get.description: Returns the system settings center view assembled from enabled capability manifests. Records are response-projected, so protected provider secrets are masked or omitted.

put.description: Updates an existing record owned by an enabled capability configuration resource. The settings runtime rejects non-configuration resources and non-writable value fields.

post.summary: Start an Admin credential-auth login challenge
post.description: Credential-auth v1 runtime. Creates a digest-only CAPTCHA or slider challenge transaction for login; Admin login currently closes the CAPTCHA flow, while slider presentation and risk strategy can continue to evolve without changing the secret transport contract.

get.summary: Read the Admin credential-auth public encryption key
get.description: Returns the short-lived public key metadata used by credential-auth clients to encrypt password or SMS OTP secrets with ECDH P-256 plus AES-256-GCM before POST /api/auth/login.

post.summary: Exchange Admin credentials or an identity provider transaction
Start an Admin identity provider transaction
Start an Admin credential-auth SMS OTP transaction
post.description: Credential-auth P0 runtime. Creates a phone SMS OTP transaction through notification.sms for the configured phone-sms-otp provider.

Conflict.description: Request conflicts with the current reveal state

Gone.description: Reveal challenge, factor or grant expired

ServiceUnavailable.description: Sensitive reveal runtime or protected value unavailable

CustomOperationData.description: Custom handler response. Use the route metadata, resource schema and handler implementation as the source of truth until a resource-specific response contract is declared.

AdminQueryRequest.description: Structured query payload compiled from safe UI filters or SQL-like input. Field names must come from the resource schema whitelist; raw input must never be concatenated into SQL.

codeChallenge.description: PKCE S256 code challenge generated by the Admin client.

clientPublicKey.description: Base64url encoded raw P-256 ephemeral public key.

publicKey.description: Base64url encoded raw P-256 server public key.

clientFingerprint.description: Optional client-side risk fingerprint; only a digest may be persisted by credential-auth.

debugProof.description: Development/test only proof returned when credential-auth debug mode is enabled.

debugCode.description: Development/test only debug code returned by mock-local SMS runtime.

AdminCredentialPasswordMutationData.x-platform-secret-projection: no password, verifier, reset token or encrypted secret material is returned

schema.description: The active Admin resource schema for this enabled capability configuration resource.

AdminSettingsResourceItem.x-platform-secret-projection: response projection must mask or omit protected provider secrets

AdminSettingsUpdateRequest.x-platform-write-policy: Only writable public/plain value fields on enabled configuration resources may be submitted.

AdminMessageCenterSMSReceipt.x-platform-secret-projection: only redacted SMS target and provider receipt metadata are returned

AdminMessageCenterDeliveriesRunData.x-platform-secret-projection: worker result exposes aggregate counts only; delivery records retain redacted target metadata
